$schema: HMA (Hull Moving Average) golden values. period=9.
$source: Hand-derived for constantPrice — WMA on constant input yields constant at every stage; 2*WMA(c, n/2) - WMA(c, n) = 2c - c = c; final WMA(c, sqrt(n)) = c.
$note: pureUptrend/spike golden deferred to pandas-ta gen-golden.py; property/edge tests cover the rest. Warm-up = period-1 + round(sqrt(period))-1 = 8+2 = 10 for period=9.
